e1.subjectLine: Two weeks in with one pair
e1.bigIdea: One pair starts the signal. More pairs sustain it.
e1.heroRationale: Warm lifestyle image — child sitting on floor playing, privacy-first. Mirror moment lets parent see their own child in the scene.
e1.socialProofRationale: Three-Family Testimonial Pattern with L1/L2/L3 parent stories showing varied timelines
e1.mechanismRationale: Signal wave metaphor — gentle sine wave representing neural pathway building over time
e1.ctaRationale: Permission-framed dual CTA: primary bundle offer + soft keep-using-1-pair option
e1.trustRationale: 60-Day Guarantee badge near CTA — YOUR JUDGMENT framing
e1.decorativeRationale: Warm cream journal-like texture, signal-wave SVG inline illustration as visual breath
e1.photoRationale: Clean flat-lay for product section; lifestyle for hero. No two emails in same flow share primary photo.

r1r6Compliance.R1_symptomOverLabel: PASS — No level labels. Uses verbal 4-year-old, sensory-sensitive 6-year-old, non-verbal 9-year-old
r1r6Compliance.R2_recognitionAnchors: PASS — 5 anchors: pause before accident, pulling at wet pants, tolerating underwear 30+ min, saying wet, nothing visible yet
r1r6Compliance.R3_ageRanges: PASS — No fixed ages in hooks. Testimonials span 4, 6, 9
r1r6Compliance.R4_verbalNonVerbal: PASS — tell you they're wet, or show you with a gesture paired throughout
r1r6Compliance.R5_timelineFlexibility: PASS — 2 weeks to 6-8 weeks ranges, no fixed promises
r1r6Compliance.R6_lowBarSuccess: PASS — Success = pause, look down, tolerating. Never fully trained

creativeStrategy.layout: Single-column, 600px max. Header, Hero, Hook, Recognition Anchors, Three-Family Testimonials, Mechanism, CTA, Lena Sign-Off, Footer
creativeStrategy.contraption: Signal Wave — SVG sine wave that builds amplitude as reader scrolls, representing neural pathway building
creativeStrategy.easterEgg: Hidden S in footer kerned wider, expands into signal-wave icon on hover

e2.bigIdea: Daily consistency is what builds the signal pathway, and one pair cannot deliver daily consistency.
e2.heroRationale: 3+3 Bundle arranged in rotation circle — calm, practical visual of the rotation concept
e2.socialProofRationale: Three-Family Pattern: L1 (week 2 awareness), L2 (week 4 first look), L3 (familiarity phase)
e2.mechanismRationale: Neural pathway explanation with consistency-of-wear variable
e2.ctaRationale: Primary: Add 3+3 Bundle. Secondary: Re-order 1 more pair. Permission framing.
e2.decorativeRationale: ASCII-style progress bar showing signal exposure hours — Easter egg for close readers
e2.photoRationale: Different flat-lay for product section, different lifestyle for hero (no photo overlap with E1)

r1r6Compliance.R1_symptomOverLabel: PASS — No level labels. Symptom-only language throughout
r1r6Compliance.R2_recognitionAnchors: PASS — 4 anchors: laundry-waiting, signal starting but spotty, pull-ups backup, no change yet
r1r6Compliance.R3_ageRanges: PASS — Whether your child is 3 or 10, age-agnostic
r1r6Compliance.R4_verbalNonVerbal: PASS — tells you or shows you paired throughout
r1r6Compliance.R6_lowBarSuccess: PASS — pause, pull at pants, look at wet spot, step toward bathroom

creativeStrategy.contraption: How many pairs does your child need? 3-step visual slider
creativeStrategy.easterEgg: ASCII progress bar showing 1-pair vs 3+3 signal exposure comparison

e3.bigIdea: Consistency is the missing variable — the 3+3 rotation closes the gap between wearing and learning.
e3.heroRationale: Soft visual: 3 pairs in rotation with circular arrow motif — clean, practical
e3.socialProofRationale: Three-Family Pattern spanning Week 3, Week 4, Month 1 milestones
e3.mechanismRationale: Signal reinforcement explanation with daily wear = continuous data stream metaphor
e3.ctaRationale: Dual CTA: primary bundle ($79.99) + soft keep-using-1-pair option
e3.photoRationale: Fresh flat-lay and lifestyle photos, no overlap with E1/E2

e2.heroRationale: Milestone marker tone — warm, functional, reflective
e2.socialProofRationale: Three-Family Pattern at 90-day mark: L1 (initiating at 6 weeks), L2 (paused at Week 10), L3 (looked at wet spot at 9 years)

e2.ctaRationale: Re-order 3+3 or size up. Reply-to-Lena for sizing help.

e1.bigIdea: The Long Haul — 150 Days of Body-Signal Learning.
e1.heroRationale: 150-day milestone timeline line with 5 annotated dots
e1.socialProofRationale: Three-Family at 150 days: L1 (said potty at 4 months), L2 (initiating twice/week), L3 (felt something at 9 years)
e1.mechanismRationale: 3-layer product explanation: cotton inner (signal), smart absorption (protection), outer barrier (leak-resistant)
e1.ctaRationale: Primary: See refreshed 5+5. Secondary: Explore single pairs and accessories
e1.decorativeRationale: Tally mark background texture (150 marks) as subconscious acknowledgment of time invested
e1.photoRationale: Fresh photos unique to Replenish C flow

e2.bigIdea: 150 days in, your first 10 pairs have earned their retirement.

e2.socialProofRationale: Three-Family Pattern: L1 (telling before), L2 (stops when feels wetness), L3 (felt wetness, not trained)

e2.photoRationale: Fresh photos, no overlap with E1 or other flows

e1-gf.subjectLine: How's it going with the body signals?
e1-gf.bigIdea: No-guilt, re-anchor, re-educate — body-signal learning is non-linear

e1-l1.subjectLine: Pre-K is coming, here's the gap you can still close
e1-l1.bigIdea: Starting again isn't starting over — the bridge is still there.

e1-l2.subjectLine: If it didn't click, here's what we'd try differently
e1-l2.bigIdea: The second time is different — not because the product changed, because the nervous system needs enough reps.

e1-l3.subjectLine: It's been a while, this exists, no pressure
e1-l3.bigIdea: We're not here to ask why you stopped. We're here to remind you what's here.

e2-gf.subjectLine: Three families, three different kids, one thing in common
e2-gf.bigIdea: Reconsideration — Three-Family stories showing diverse outcomes

e2-l1.subjectLine: Pre-K is coming — here's the gap you can close
e2-l1.bigIdea: Pre-K success story — peer proof that the approach works under deadline pressure

e2-l2.subjectLine: If it didn't click, here's what one BCBA tells her families
e2-l2.bigIdea: BCBA endorsement story — the sensory piece that fills the gap behavioral protocols cannot reach

e2-l3.bigIdea: Late-trainer story — proof possibility without false promises

e3-gf.subjectLine: Still figuring it out? Door's open.
e3-gf.bigIdea: Open door — warm, dignified off-ramp that preserves relationship for future return

e3-l1.bigIdea: Final urgency — signal-timing gap reframe + Pre-K anchor

e3-l2.subjectLine: If it didn't click, here's what we'd try differently
